extraction.ocr_text:
Autopilot
Preview

Help create an agent based on the following description: The conversational agent
that will use available tools from UiPath Orchestrator and context grounding indexes
to answer various questions about: Invoice processing documents, ServiceNow
incidents and associated Orchestrator Jobs.

Reasoned for 1 s
I'll start by getting the current agent configuration and exploring the available resources in your
solution simultaneously!

Agent configuration                                              Successful

Get Solution Resources                                           Successful

Get Solution Resources                                           Successful

Reasoned for 7 s
Excellent findings! I can see exactly what we need. Here's my plan:

• 🔧 5 tools from the "Conversational Agents/Orchestrator Tools" folder: Invoice retrieval, ServiceNow
incidents (get/notes/post), and Orchestrator Jobs
• 📚 2 context indexes for ServiceNow incidents categorization

Let me wire everything up simult[...]
extraction.description: This screenshot shows the Autopilot panel in UiPath Studio Web while creating or configuring a conversational agent. Autopilot has analyzed the user's natural-language description, retrieved the current agent configuration and solution resources, and displays successful status cards for those actions. The lower section summarizes the discovered tools and context indexes and indicates that Autopilot is about to wire them into the agent.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows Autopilot successfully reasoning over the agent setup, finding available tools and context indexes, and preparing a configuration plan for the conversational agent.
